Resources

Guides, templates and updates. Built into the journey.

Resources should help teams set up faster, understand the product, and follow the build as CSorro grows.

Create a company hub, invite people, select modules and start with a dashboard that makes sense.

Projects, CRM, invoices, storage, reports and team communication already structured.

Follow releases, feature decisions, backend progress and upcoming modules.

Owner, admin, manager, member, client and guest roles with custom overrides.
